Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption" 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" = 'CO' AND bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" != 'Mobile Home' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/759898bf770e3b595e98a51675535ddc51d7f7aec490b36063ca030c8f182112/422166bf-3d8d-4f66-a838-bbd4ec23daa7/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
